SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label

Class LabelCollection

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.LabelCollection
public class LabelCollection extends Object

Realises a collection for term labels keeping track whether its content has been modified since its initialization. It provides faster lookup than the previously used immutable sets.

Note that it does not keep track of changes, so adding a label and removing it afterwards will mark the collection as modified

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LabelCollection(ImmutableArray<TermLabel> p_labels)
    initializes the label collection with the given labels

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(TermLabel label)
    adds the given label to the collection and marks it as modified
    boolean
    contains(TermLabel label)
    checks wether a label is contained in the collection
    <S> S
    getFirst(Class<S> termLabelClass)
    returns the first element in the collection of the given kind
    The method uses instanceof as check, so if subtypes are possible, any of those will be returned.
    Collection<TermLabel>
    getLabels()
    returns the underlying collection of labels (careful, you get full access to the underlying set)
    boolean
    isModified()
    returns true if the collection has been modified after its initial creation
    void
    remove(TermLabel label)
    removes the given label from the collection and marks it as modified
    void
    removeIf(Predicate<TermLabel> p)
    removes labels that satisfy the predicate and marks the set as modified if a label has been removed
    void
    replaceWith(Collection<TermLabel> newLabels, boolean p_changed)
    DO NOT USE; ONLUY for TESTS

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • LabelCollection

      public LabelCollection(ImmutableArray<TermLabel> p_labels)
      initializes the label collection with the given labels

      any change to its content afterwards will cause method isModified() to return true

      Parameters:
      p_labels - the list of TermLabels for this collections

  • Method Details

    • add

      public void add(TermLabel label)
      adds the given label to the collection and marks it as modified
      Parameters:
      label - the TermLabel to be added

    • remove

      public void remove(TermLabel label)
      removes the given label from the collection and marks it as modified
      Parameters:
      label - the TermLabel to be added

    • isModified

      public boolean isModified()
      returns true if the collection has been modified after its initial creation

    • contains

      public boolean contains(TermLabel label)
      checks wether a label is contained in the collection
      Parameters:
      label - the TermLabel to be checked
      Returns:
      true iff the label is contained

    • getLabels

      public Collection<TermLabel> getLabels()
      returns the underlying collection of labels (careful, you get full access to the underlying set)

    • removeIf

      public void removeIf(Predicate<TermLabel> p)
      removes labels that satisfy the predicate and marks the set as modified if a label has been removed
      Parameters:
      p - the Predicate used for testing

    • getFirst

      public <S> S getFirst(Class<S> termLabelClass)
      returns the first element in the collection of the given kind
      The method uses instanceof as check, so if subtypes are possible, any of those will be returned.
      Type Parameters:
      S - the type of the label to be retrieved
      Parameters:
      termLabelClass - the Class specifying the kind of termlabel to be retrieved
      Returns:
      the TermLabel of the specified type or null, if no such label is present

    • replaceWith

      public void replaceWith(Collection<TermLabel> newLabels, boolean p_changed)
      DO NOT USE; ONLUY for TESTS
